summary_en: ¥39.00 per share dividend (¥17M total) for FY3/26, effective 2026-06-29. First dividend payment in company history. Sourced from retained earnings. Decision rationale: improved financial position and balance-sheet strength now permit shareholder distribution while maintaining internal reserves for future growth investment.
title_en: Notice Regarding Surplus Dividend (Initial Dividend Payment)
translation_en_brief:
Flobal Corporation's board of directors resolved on 2026-05-15 to propose a dividend payment to the shareholder meeting scheduled for 2026-06-26. The company will pay ¥39.00 per share as an end-of-period dividend for fiscal year ending 2026-03-31, totalling ¥17 million, with an effective date of 2026-06-29. This is the company's first dividend in its history.

The company had previously prioritized strengthening its management foundation and ensuring financial safety, forgoing dividends. However, the board has determined that after consolidating the financial position, comprehensive consideration of business performance, financial condition, cash flow, and future capital needs for growth investment justifies initiating shareholder distributions. The dividend will be sourced from retained earnings.

Looking forward, the company states it will continue evaluating stable and ongoing profit distribution while maintaining focus on financial strengthening and securing investment capital for future business growth, taking into account performance, financial condition, and cash flow developments.
